headline: Expedia, Booking, and Airbnb Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over" and threatened fresh strikes, sending oil higher.

headline: Airbnb’s $90 Billion Growth Story Is Far From Peaking
summary: $29 billion. That is what guests booked through Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) in a single quarter. Indeed, any time investors see gross bookings surge 19% year over year in a given quarter, that’s a big move. At that pace, the company’s trailing platform volume now approaches the $90 billion mark annualized. This figure has become shorthand for ... Airbnb’s $90 Billion Growth Story Is Far From Peaking

headline: Airbnb to snitch on social housing cheats after taxpayers lose £2bn
summary: Airbnb will be forced to report social housing cheats to the Government as fraudulent listings cost the taxpayer almost £2bn a year.

headline: Lawmakers probe growing use of Chinese AI models in U.S. companies
